# Rival Search MCP

> Rival Search MCP is an open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and VS Code real-time web research capabilities. It provides 10 specialized tools across 20+ data sources with zero API keys required. One URL to install.

Rival Search MCP solves the fundamental problem of AI assistants being disconnected from the live internet. By implementing the MCP protocol, it bridges the gap between AI capabilities and real-time web data, enabling deep research, competitor analysis, market intelligence, and academic research — all without any authentication or API keys.

## Tools

- [Web Search](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Multi-engine search across DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, and Wikipedia with automatic fallbacks
- [Social Search](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Search Reddit, Hacker News, Dev.to, ProductHunt, and Medium without authentication
- [News Aggregation](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Real-time news from Google News RSS, DuckDuckGo News, and Yahoo News
- [GitHub Search](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Search GitHub public repositories with rate-limited API access
- [Website Mapper](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Intelligent website crawling with research, documentation, and mapping modes
- [Content Operations](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Retrieve, stream, analyze, and extract content from any URL
- [Research Topic](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): End-to-end research workflow with source discovery and key finding extraction
- [Document Analysis](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Extract text from PDF, Word, Text, and Images with EasyOCR
- [Scientific Research](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Academic paper search via arXiv and Semantic Scholar; dataset discovery via Kaggle and HuggingFace
- [Research Agent](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#tools): Autonomous AI agent with 7 internal tools generating comprehensive structured reports

## Installation

- [Remote Server](https://RivalSearchMCP.fastmcp.app/mcp): Live hosted MCP endpoint — add this URL to any MCP client for instant access to all 10 tools
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP): Full source code with installation instructions for local self-hosting
- [Claude Code Setup](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#quickstart): Run `claude mcp add RivalSearchMCP --url https://RivalSearchMCP.fastmcp.app/mcp`

## Integrations

- [Claude Desktop](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#claude-desktop): Settings → MCP → Add Remote Server
- [Cursor](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#cursor): One-click install or manual MCP config
- [VS Code](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#vs-code): Add to .vscode/mcp.json
- [Claude Code](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP#claude-code): Single CLI command

## Optional

- [MIT License](https://github.com/damionrashford/RivalSearchMCP/blob/main/LICENSE): Open source under MIT License
